title: Polystichum fortunei
taxonomy: Polystichum fortunei is classified within the plant kingdom as a species of fern, specifically within the family Dryopteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Polystichum, which comprises various species of evergreen ferns. The classification further breaks down into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, order Polypodiales, and family Dryopteridaceae. Polystichum fortunei is also known as the Fortune's Holly Fern, a name that reflects its evergreen leaves resembling holly. This classification provides a clear understanding of the plant's position within the plant kingdom.
uses: Polystichum fortunei is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine.
